prestazioni: Forced induction via Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom-built LF-VE internals package featuring Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings, supporting 280-300whp on E85 fuel with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing boost via a Turbosmart CompGate40 wastegate and a Pierburg 300 LPH fuel pump

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential, PPG 2.15 final drive ratio ring & pinion set, and a Fidanza lightweight flywheel (8.5 lbs) paired with an ACT 6-puck sprung clutch for rapid engagement under high-torque conditions

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (22-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment), SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts), and Racing Beat front sway bar (22mm adjustable) to eliminate body roll during high-G cornering
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (NC-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a Seibon carbon fiber hardtop (12 lbs weight reduction) for improved aerodynamics and aggressive stance

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Varis Japan (NC-specific, 3-piece design with adjustable angle for downforce tuning) paired with a Mazdaspeed rear spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustable) to balance front/rear aero at high speeds

Interior overhaul featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, 7-point harness compatible) with custom NC-specific mounting brackets, a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard/door cards with red stitching (Mazdaspeed OEM+ style)
